offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual expense report generation causes delays in financial reporting. We automate expense categorization instead of manual spreadsheets and email submissions.
problem: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
